title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Melorra

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Melorra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Melorra in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
